opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I was just sitting on the couch and my heart suddenly took off at a million miles an hour, my chest felt tight, and I almost passed out before it stopped just as suddenly.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It happened again today and it really scared me — it came on out of nowhere, lasted about 15 minutes, and then stopped like a switch flipped. I want to know what is going on and whether it is dangerous.

symptom_narrative.onset: completely sudden, out of the blue while sitting still on the couch
symptom_narrative.duration: about 15 minutes, then stopped abruptly on its own
symptom_narrative.character: a very fast, pounding, perfectly regular racing heart — not fluttery or all over the place, just extremely fast and steady
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: terrifying — the fastest I've ever felt my heart go; I had to lie flat on the floor
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in my chest, with a tight feeling
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes in sudden bursts with nothing in between; it has happened three times this year
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing I did — it just stopped by itself, like a switch flipping off
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: I can't find anything that sets it off; it just starts on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: felt lightheaded and nearly fainted during it, and my chest felt tight; I was very short of breath while it was racing
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: three times this year, all sudden and all stopping on their own
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've fully recovered and feel normal now, but I'm really anxious and scared it will happen again, especially because I live alone

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: very fit with excellent exercise tolerance; drinks a fair bit of caffeine and uses energy drinks / pre-workout supplements
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: otherwise completely healthy; lives alone and the unpredictability of these episodes is badly affecting quality of life

objective_data_offered.value: my pulse feels normal and steady now, maybe around 70
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-palpated by the patient, not a device reading
